onset.Description: Onset (in seconds) of the event from the beginning of the first datapoint. Negative onsets account for events before the first stored data point.

duration.Description: Duration of the event in seconds from onset. Must be zero, positive, or 'n/a' if unavailable. A zero (i.e. 0.001s) value indicates an impulse event.

sample.Description: The event onset time in number of sampling points.First sample is 0.

value.Description: The event code (also known as trigger code or event ID) associated with the event.

Levels.1: S_1: neutral cue; tone onset (750 Hz: tone for baseline & high-level prior condition)
Levels.2: S_2: right cue; tone onset (600/900 Hz: low-level prior condition; left-enhancing glasses: high-level prior condition)
Levels.4: S_4: left cue; tone onset (600/900 Hz: low-level prior condition; right-enhancing glasses: high-level prior condition)

trial_type.Description: The type, category, or name of the event.
